summary: Closeout packet for plan_2026_05_05_platform_site_promotion (verdict: needs_tasking). 1 memory candidates.

extracted.text: Single Netlify project per site (not two) — branch deploys handle staging
extracted.rationale: Decided against a separate <tag>-staging Netlify project. One Netlify project per site, with native branch deploys serving staging at <tag>--staging.netlify.app and the production branch (main) serving the custom domain. Simpler, matches Netlify native pattern.

open_gaps: platform/capabilities/site/promote.sh — dev→staging→main with date-based release tags
platform/capabilities/site/rollback.sh — revert to previous or named tag
Assisted-manual UI pattern (open vendor URL + poll for completion)
Apply to MBSH as first user
